_meta.registered_at_policy: each entry carries its own registered_at (first registration time); forward validation starts there, NOT source_thesis_date; already-accrued return is discarded (pre-registration).
_meta.lock: sha256 over HASH_FIELDS; tamper-evident; reruns preserve locked hashes
_meta.content_addressable: this file is a pure function of registry content; no-op rerun is byte-identical
_meta.status_note: all PENDING; nothing promoted to capital (§3.1). [unvalidated intuition].
